name: NetIntel AI
description: A next-generation AI platform that bridges network operations and customer experience. NetIntel AI uses AI agents, predictive analytics, and real-time telemetry to automate support, predict failures, and deliver a unified view of network health and customer satisfaction.
image: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 200'%3E%3Crect width='200' height='200' fill='%23182d4d'/%3E%3Cpath d='M 50 100 Q 100 50 150 100 Q 100 150 50 100' fill='none' stroke='%2322d3ee' stroke-width='2'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='100' cy='100' r='8' fill='%2322d3ee'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='75' cy='75' r='4' fill='%2322d3ee'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='125' cy='75' r='4' fill='%2322d3ee'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='75' cy='125' r='4' fill='%2322d3ee'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='125' cy='125' r='4' fill='%2322d3ee'/%3E%3C/svg%3E
capabilities: AI Network Copilot: Natural-language interface for real-time diagnostics and resolution recommendations without manual log analysis.
Predictive Maintenance: ML models predict failures and capacity bottlenecks before they cause outages or SLA breaches.
CX Automation & Self-Healing: Automated remediation and proactive customer notification before tickets are raised.
Customer Health Dashboard: Unified view of network health and customer satisfaction signals in one place.

pricing.features: On-premises deployment, SLA, custom AI models
